feedback.text: Hello dear ECC, This is a request to please keep the purpose of the "Stop Killing Games" initiative in mind, as it is directly about customer rights and could affect the way we interact with a multitude of other online-only services in a more consumer-friendly manner, from my standpoint. Thusly, i would suggest something akin to what was pointed out in this YouTube video (https://youtu.be/E6vO4RIcBtE?si=15SiDeTYNiSdcAS0), which is a new, 6th section to the Digital Fairness Act specifically on the issue of customers losing the right to use already-bought products, such as video games. Thank you and have a wonderful day!
